common.saveError: Failed to save. Please try again.

home.title: Home
home.subtitle: Let's cook something delicious.
home.noRecipesYet: No recipes yet. Add your first one above.

recipes.title: Recipes
recipes.noRecipesDesc: Add your first recipe to start building your collection.

plan.title: Plan
plan.noMealsHint: Tap the + icons in the grid to add meals first.
plan.helpDesc: Tap + on any slot to assign a recipe. Tap the trash icon on a recipe card to remove it.
plan.deleteMealDesc: Remove this meal from your plan?

shopping.title: Shopping List
shopping.emptyDesc: Add recipes to your meal plan or recipe collection to generate a shopping list.

recipe.notFoundDesc: This recipe may have been deleted or the link is invalid.
recipe.deleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete "{{title}}"? This cannot be undone.
recipe.ingredientsHint: Tap ✎ to edit parsed ingredients. Fix units inline.
recipe.noIngredients: No ingredients listed for this recipe.
recipe.noInstructions: No instructions listed for this recipe.

photo.heading: Take a photo of a recipe
photo.subheading: Snap a recipe, cookbook page, or a dish. We'll extract the details for you.
photo.tipsDesc: Good lighting, minimal shadows, and a clear view work best.
photo.cameraPermissionRequired: Camera permission is required to take photos.
photo.galleryPermissionRequired: Photo library permission is required to choose images.

voice.heading: Tap to record
voice.subheading: Record a voice note of your recipe and we'll extract it with AI.
voice.sampleQuote: Two tablespoons of fish sauce and half a kilo of pork belly
voice.understandTitle: We'll extract ingredients and steps from your recording.
voice.keepSpeaking: Tap the button when you're done.

editRecipe.title: Edit Recipe
editRecipe.notFoundDesc: This recipe may have been deleted.

more.title: More
more.aiSettingsDesc: Configure your AI provider for recipe extraction
more.resetDataDesc: Permanently delete all recipes, meal plans, and shopping lists.

aiSettings.title: AI Settings
aiSettings.connectDesc: Mise uses AI to help extract recipes from text or voice. Your API key is stored on this device and is not sent to Mise servers.
aiSettings.apiKeyHint: Your key is stored locally and never sent to Mise servers.
aiSettings.testNotConfigured: Please fill in all fields first.

aiErrors.invalidKey: Could not connect. Please check your API key.
aiErrors.invalidModel: The selected model is not available. Please check the model name.
aiErrors.invalidResponse: AI returned an invalid result. Please try again.
aiErrors.networkError: Could not connect to AI Provider. Please check your server URL.
aiErrors.timeout: Connection timed out. Please check your server URL.
aiErrors.audioNotSupported: This AI provider does not support audio input. Please use text input instead.
aiErrors.visionNotSupported: This model does not support image input. Try a vision-capable model like llava, moondream, or llama3.2-vision.
aiErrors.readError: Failed to read file. Please try again.
aiErrors.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

aiReview.title: Review Recipe
aiReview.lowConfidenceDesc: Mise is not fully confident about this recipe. Please review it before saving.
aiReview.discardConfirmDesc: This recipe draft will be lost.

addRecipe.ai.notConfiguredDesc: To use AI features, choose a provider and enter your API key.

dialogs.resetDesc: This will permanently delete all recipes, meal plans, and shopping lists. This action cannot be undone.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Mise respects your privacy. This policy explains how we handle information when you use the app.
privacy.localBody: All of your data — including recipes, meal plans, and shopping lists — is stored directly on your device. We do not store this data on our servers.
privacy.collectBody: We do not require you to create an account, we do not track your location, we do not collect personal data, and we do not share information with third parties.
privacy.cameraBody: The app may request camera and photo gallery access so you can capture or select recipe images. These images are only used and stored on your device.
privacy.securityBody: Your data is protected by your device's built-in operating system security. We recommend enabling device encryption for enhanced security.
privacy.rightsBody: You have full control over your data. You can delete all data at any time via the Delete All Data option in settings.
privacy.changesBody: We may update this policy from time to time. Any changes will be communicated within the app.
privacy.contactBody: If you have any questions about this privacy policy, please contact us at: support@mise.app

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: By using Mise, you agree to the following terms and conditions. Please read them carefully.
terms.usageBody: Mise is a recipe management and meal planning application for personal, non-commercial use. You may use the app to store, organize, and plan your meals.
terms.contentBody: You own all recipes and content you add to the app. We do not claim ownership of your content. You are responsible for the accuracy and safety of the recipes you use.
terms.responsibilityBody: Mise provides tools to organize recipes and generate shopping lists. We are not responsible for cooking outcomes, food allergies, or any health issues arising from the use of recipes. Always verify ingredients and cooking procedures before proceeding.
terms.offlineBody: The app is designed to work offline. Some features like photo scan or voice input may require a network connection for processing. Your data remains stored locally even when using these features.
terms.changesBody: We may update the app and these terms over time. Continuing to use the app after changes means you accept the new terms.
terms.liabilityBody: To the extent permitted by law, we are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of the app.

dataSafety.title: Data Safety
dataSafety.intro: Mise is designed with security-first principles. Here's how we protect your data.
dataSafety.localBody: 100% of your data is stored on your device. We do not sync data to the cloud unless you actively do so (e.g., device backup).
dataSafety.noAccountBody: You do not need to register, log in, or provide personal information to use the app. This eliminates account-related data breach risks.
dataSafety.encryptionBody: Data is protected by iOS/Android operating system encryption and application-level SQLite database encryption. Ensure your device has a passcode/PIN/Face ID enabled for enhanced security.
dataSafety.trackingBody: We do not use cookies, do not integrate third-party analytics, do not show ads, and do not build user profiles. The app is completely private.
dataSafety.deleteBody: You can delete all data from the app at any time using the Delete All Data button in settings. This action cannot be undone.
dataSafety.thirdPartyBody: No third party has access to your recipe or shopping list data. We do not sell, rent, or share data with anyone.
dataSafety.backupBody: To protect your data, we recommend enabling device backup (iCloud or Google Drive). This helps recover data if you switch devices.
